titleStmt.title: SII 18.70: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 70. (B.K. No. 189 of 1932-33.) GADAG, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into a drain behind a broken house near Vīra-Nārāyaṇa temple.

summary.p: This inscription which refers itself to the reign of Trailōkyamalladēva contains a grant made by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Mārarasa, when he was governing Beḷuvala Threehundred. It is dated in Śaka 986, Krōdhi, [lunar] eclipse. The other details of the date are lost. In the cyclic year Krōdhi, there was only one lunar eclipse and it occurred on Monday, A.D. 1064, May 3. This date falls in the reign of Sōmēs11vara I but palaeographically, the record is assignable to a much later period. So it is possible that the grant actually made on the date mentioned above was recorded on a later date. Towards the end of the record a certain Tippa who probably reconstructed the temple is mentioned and another date occurs; but except the month Phālguṇa all other details are lost.

The original grant records a gift of land made, probably by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Mārarasa, to the god Sōmēśvara of Lokkiguṇḍi. It was entrusted to Tatpurushajīya, the āchārya of the temple of Sōmēśvara. Mārarasa bore the title Chōḷaṁ-goṇḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhi
rāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī mattrailōkya
dēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkka
pajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara vīramahēśvara
re balgaṁḍaṁ bhūpamāṁdhātaṁ dānārkajātaṁ kalikālakārtavīryya nacaḷi
paṁnnāḷesamuddharaṇaṁ vairisaṁhāraṁ siṁhadēvadiśāpaṭṭaṁ
dhanaṁ koṁkaṇigabaḷajaḷadhibaḍavānaḷaṁ drōhakāḷānaḷaṁ saraṇāgata
mṛgamadāmōdaṁ śṛmattraiḷōkyamalladēvapādapaṁkajabhramaraṁ śṛma
ś®matu cōḷaṁgoṁḍa mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ vūrarasaruṁ beḷuvala mūnūṟumaṁ
visiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadināḷuttamaṇnigeṟeya
ś®matraiḷōkyamalladēvara kayyoḷpaḍedu sakavarṣa 986 neya krōdhi saṁva
magrahaṇadaṁdu ś®matu lokkiguṁḍiya sōmēśvarada sthānācārya
yadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇaparāyaṇajapasamādhisīḷasaṁpannarappa ś®ma
vara siśyaru tatpuruṣajīyara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi beḷvalamūnū ṟara baḷiya
rvvābhyaṁtarasiddhiyiṁ sarvvanamaśyamāgi dēvarggaṁ maṭhada tapōdhanarggaṁ pādamūḷa pari
volake sīme yāvudeṁdaḍe haḍuvalu nēṟiligeya polada mēreyiṁ na
geya polada mēreyindaṁbare paḍeya diṁ baḍagaṇa mēreyiṁ pa
reḍeyaṇa pervvaḷḷa . Alliṁ paḍuvalpiriya bēlēṟa polada mēre
yintī catussīmeyoḷagāphāṭaṁ mattaru sāsira
maunānuṣṭhāṇaparāyaṇajapasamādhiśīḷasaṁpannaruṁ samastaguṇa
masaṁsthāvabhṛthāvagāhanapavitrīkṛtaśarīra
ryyaparākramarāśṛtajanakalpavṛkṣa
rarssāpānugrahasamarttha
rarppāpabhīrugaḷu paranārīdūra
haśrasamayrārgghyāruhadvijakula
ttimahāgrāmaṁ [ś®]lokkiguṇḍiyūroḍeyapramukha mahā
sabālavṛddharnneredu dharmmaṁgaḷaṁ svadharmmadiṁ surakṣitamāgi
pāpakṣayakāri negaḷda rāmara datti mahāgrahāra
rṇnavōpamadinoppuvudī trijaganmanōharaṁ . [Idu] sakaḷāvani
rjjitamāytenelokki guṇḍeyoḷmu doreyalla
cakravarttiyaṁ . Alli ś®sāsirvvara guṇābhivarṇnanameṁ teṁdaḍe . v® . sthiravā
kārigaḷeyde vēdamayarājñātajñarudvṛttasaṁharadā vānaḷatībratāpa sadṛśarssaujanyadhanya
sāsirvvarurvvīstutaru . Avara priyaputraṁ . veṁdaḍe hartteya pareda
lārjjise paradarpparadiṁge beṟeda ḷkoṁḍoḍave . taḷadiṁdaṁ kaḷasakke nōḍalene tuṁ
ś® lokkiguṁḍimukhatiḷakaṁ tānene seṭṭi māḍisidanī yesasthōma dēvālayakkoḷave pōlise
. Eṁdu tanatanage pogaḷvarvvaṁdartthiye nōrvvaralla vesana manadaṁdu māḍisuvoṁ
mudadiṁ sāsirvvara padapadmamanārādhisuttamirddamājñāspadadī dharmma manabhyuditaṁ māḍalke
doḍī bhāgyōnnatike mānōnnatikeyadaṁtuṭeṁtuṭeṁbavaroḷavē
sā sirvvareyde kāruṇyaṁgeydo tige saṁtōsadānaṁda dharmmiyādaṁtippa . jaḷanidhiyoḷu ratna
jina caṁdraṁ beḷaguva teṟadiṁ sippigakuḷatiḷakaṁ toḷagi beḷagi negaḻdaṁtippa . nayavida
tāyja nātha polli piriyaṇnaṁcavuṇḍiga tamma bandhu vargga
ḍikeya tippanidēṁ kṛtakrityanādanō . paradēsa
ḷagi puruṣārtthamaniṁtu tippaṇaṁ māḍuvanē .
sadiṁ maḷigegaḷaṁtaradiṁ paṁneraḍa
kalsippigaṁ nijakuḷamani loṁdu paṇamaṁ
ḍisi dārōrvvaru va sippigarpoṟagaṇa
ge yeraḍu paṇa
māṭakūṭamaṁ naḍeyisuvantāgi māḍi . vṛtta .
rarkkaṟina naccina siṣyananūnadhai
ridēṁ bhuvana prasūtaro
ye piriyaṁ śiva
vatsarada phālguṇa
naḍeyisuvaṁtā
nidhānanā The rest
Digital edition of SII 18.70 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
